title: Ferrari Themed Bar Mitzvah
excerpt: Paige worked a gorgeous event for a special guy on Saturday night. It's almost as though I was there the entire evening, though all I did was show up with some supplies and help set up. She stayed for the…
body:
Paige worked a gorgeous event for a special guy on Saturday night. It's almost as though I was there the entire evening, though all I did was show up with some supplies and help set up. She stayed for the whole event working her magic. All these photos courtesy of Paige's post. Love that she remembers to take photos and that she shares them.

We've worked many events with The Etch-A-Sketch Man before (like this Bar Mitzvah last year), and man watching him do his magic never gets old. The clients loved their scrapbook. And we certainly love our clients!
